name: White Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Filling
1 envelope unflavored gelatin
1/2 cup water
1/2 cup sugar
8 ounces cream cheese
1 cup sour cream
6 ounces white chocolate -- melted
1 cup whipping cream
1/2 teaspoon vanilla
Combine crust ingredients and press in bottom of springform pan. Set aside.
In saucepan, combine gelatin and water, stand 1 minute. Add sugar and heat until dissolved. Beat cream cheese and sour cream together. Add the white chocolate, gelatin mixture, whipping cream, and vanilla. Mix until smooth. Pour into crust-lined pan, cover, and refrigerate at least 3 hours or overnight until firm.
